summary: Complete mobile responsiveness testing for MVNO Manager. All 13 features tested successfully. Mobile (390x844) and Desktop (1920x800) viewports verified. Hamburger menu, sidebar overlay, touch-friendly buttons/inputs, horizontal scroll tables, and responsive grids all working correctly.
passed_tests: Mobile (390px) - Login page renders correctly with large buttons (48px) and inputs (44px)
Mobile (390px) - Dashboard shows stacked cards (grid-cols-1) and hamburger menu icon visible
Mobile (390px) - Hamburger menu opens sidebar overlay with all 11 nav links visible
Mobile (390px) - Sidebar closes when clicking overlay
Mobile (390px) - Sidebar close X button works
Mobile (390px) - Sidebar closes after navigation (useEffect on location.pathname)
Mobile (390px) - Chips page shows table with horizontal scroll (table 1131px, container 324px)
Mobile (390px) - Carteira Movel shows 2x2 summary cards (grid-cols-2) and full-width button (358px)
Mobile (390px) - Ativacao page form works on mobile viewport with touch-friendly inputs
Mobile (390px) - Clientes page header stacks vertically (flex-col sm:flex-row)
Mobile (390px) - Create dialog for Clientes is scrollable (max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto) and fits mobile (max-w-[calc(100vw-2rem)])
Mobile (390px) - Linhas page renders correctly with horizontal scroll table
Desktop (1920px) - Sidebar is always visible (not translated off-screen)
Desktop (1920px) - Chips page renders correctly with sidebar
Desktop (1920px) - Clientes page renders correctly with sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile responsiveness implementation is well-structured using Tailwind CSS breakpoints
Touch targets meet 44px minimum height requirement (btn-primary, btn-secondary, form-input)
Sidebar uses CSS translate-x for smooth mobile slide-in/out animation
Tables use overflow-x-auto for horizontal scrolling on mobile
Dialogs use max-w-[calc(100vw-2rem)] and max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto for mobile compatibility
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness fully implemented and tested. Key CSS classes: sidebar, sidebar-open, sidebar-overlay, mobile-header, main-content, form-input (min-h-[44px]), btn-* (min-h-[44px]). Key test IDs: mobile-header, mobile-menu-button, sidebar-overlay, sidebar-close, nav-*. Sidebar auto-closes on route change via useEffect on location.pathname. All critical screens (Dashboard, Clientes, Chips, Ativacao, Linhas, Carteira Movel) work on mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800).
